title: filix noveboracensis
intro: Filix noveboracensis, also known as New York fern or eastern lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Filix noveboracensis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves, which can be used to treat various ailments.
